subcodes.title: Letter to the third pillar (tawhid)
subcodes.first_line: In the name of God, the Peerless, the Ever-Faithful. Say: God, my Lord! All give praise unto Him. Say: God, my Lord! All prostrate to Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الفرد المعتمد. قل الله ربی کل له لمسبحون قل الله ربی کل له یحمدون قل الله ربی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
